# AISO Group

> AISO Group is the parent brand of four specialist AI companies, based in Lisbon, Portugal.

AISO Group (Precious Episode LDA, NIF PT516578506) unites four specialist companies. Each one has a single job — you engage the specialist you need now and bring in the others when the timing is right.

- **AISO Hub** (https://aiso-hub.com): AI Search Optimization — audit, optimize, and monitor brand visibility across AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews).
- **AISO Dev** (https://aiso-dev.com): AI systems and implementation for SMBs — data pipelines, agent workflows, custom internal tools.
- **AISO Buzz** (https://aiso-buzz.com): AI-powered social and content — backed by a brand bible, validated before it ships.
- **AISO Learn** (https://aiso-learn.com): Corporate AI training — EU AI Act-aligned curricula that take teams from AI-curious to AI-capable.

## Contact

- Email: hello@aiso-group.com
- Website: https://aiso-group.com
- Location: Lisbon, Portugal
- Founded: 2025

## About

Founded by Greg Stoos to help European SMBs become visible, credible, and operational with AI — through specialist partners, not generalist bundles.
